Train 12718 RATNACHAL EXP runs from Vijayawada Jn to Visakhapatnam on Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday .

RATNACHAL EXP departs from Vijayawada Jn at 06.15 and reaches to Visakhapatnam at 12.15 . It takes 00 Hours 00 Minutes to reach from Vijayawada Jn to Visakhapatnam. The total distance covered by RATNACHAL EXP is 350 kilometers.

RATNACHAL EXP passes through 13 stations in 1 days to reach from Vijayawada Jn to Visakhapatnam.

12718 RATNACHAL EXP has a maximum halt time of 2 minutes at Nuzvid . 12718 RATNACHAL EXP arrives at Nuzvid  on 06.48 and departs at 06.50 . You can get down at Nuzvid to buy some snacks and refreshments.

Other stations with maximum halt timings are:
Food Options in 12718 RATNACHAL EXP
Enjoy a scrumptious assortment of Veg Thali, Non-Veg Thali, Jain Food, Chinese and local delicacies during your journey. Passengers in train can prefer the below-mentioned food delivery in train apps for getting fresh restaurant-style food in train.
  • RailRestro App
  • RailMitra App
  • IRCTC food ordering app

. From which station does the RATNACHAL EXP ?

. 12718 RATNACHAL EXP starts from Vijayawada Jn

. 12718 RATNACHAL EXP takes 00 Hours 00 Minutes approx to reach from Vijayawada Jn to Visakhapatnam.

. Maximum halt time of RATNACHAL EXP train is 2 minutes at Nuzvid .

. What is the train schedule of RATNACHAL EXP ?

. RATNACHAL EXP departs from Vijayawada Jn at 06.15 and reaches at Visakhapatnam by 12.15.
